caption: A woman with braided blonde hair and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a recording studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone, facing toward the left while speaking. Behind her is a white wall with a vertical yellow stripe. To her left, a monitor displays the word "Johnson" in red text. On the right side of the frame, "BOSS TALK 101" is written in red and white text, with "By: 11 Logo Studio" appearing in smaller white text below it. A circular logo containing the text "PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101" is visible in the lower-left area of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, subtly shifting her facial expression and mouth movements as she speaks.
